data.title: Broadcom Likely For Upside Backed By AI Pipeline, Market Recovery, VMWare Synergy: Analyst
data.description: JP Morgan analyst maintains Overweight rating on Broadcom Inc with price target of $210. Expects better than expected earnings and growth in AI products, with strong demand and revenue opportunities.

data.title: Crude Oil Gains 2%; BioAge Labs Shares Plunge
Vertex Has $5 Billion-Plus Opportunity In Pain And Kidney Disease Programs, Analyst Upgrades Stock
data.description: Jefferies upgrades Vertex Pharmaceuticals to Buy, highlighting a promising pipeline and $5 billion-$7 billion growth potential from pain and kidney treatments.

data.title: Oracle's Q2 Earnings: Strong Chart Signals, But Watch That RSI
data.description: Oracle (ORCL) is to report Q2 earnings with expected EPS of $1.48 and revenues of $14.12 billion. Stock up 66.50% in past year, bullish signals ahead.
